metadata.description: Claude Code marketplace: the clapback plugin — Claude clowns you (gently) with sarcastic reaction GIFs popped up on your screen.

plugins.name: clapback
plugins.description: When your prompt is broken, Claude pops a reaction GIF in a small borderless window + a dry one-liner. Multilingual, cross-platform Tkinter popup, 14 emotion categories, 700+ gifs.
